description: A painting looking through a large stone archway into a narrow city street. A hanging lamp is suspended from the arch. Through the passage, the street recedes with buildings on either side, and small figures walk along it. A church spire or tower is visible in the distance. The palette is warm — golden yellows, ochres, and soft greys. The archway creates a strong frame that draws the eye deep into the scene. The atmosphere is hazy and luminous.
